task_completion.description: Create a Question Group named 'Standard Demographics' in the 'Lab Master Template' survey.
task_completion.visual_evidence: LimeSurvey interface showing the 'Lab Master Template' survey structure with a newly created group named 'Standard Demographics'.

task_completion.description: Create the DEMO_AGE question within the group.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Question editor or summary showing question code 'DEMO_AGE', type 'Numerical input' (or type N), and text 'What is your age in years?'.

task_completion.description: Create the DEMO_EDU question with 5 specific answer options.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Question editor or summary showing question code 'DEMO_EDU', type 'List (Radio)' (or type L), text 'What is the highest degree or level of school you have completed?', and answer options with codes E1 through E5.

task_completion.description: Create the DEMO_EMP question within the group.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Question editor or summary showing question code 'DEMO_EMP', type 'Yes/No' (or type Y), and text 'Are you currently employed for wages or salary?'.
A browser download dialog saving the file as 'standard_demographics.lsg' to the Documents folder, or a file manager/terminal showing this file exists in /home/ga/Documents/.

task_completion.description: Import the exported group into a new survey titled 'Social Interaction Study 2024'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: LimeSurvey interface showing a survey titled 'Social Interaction Study 2024' containing 'Standard Demographics' as its only question group.

integrity.description: The agent used a web browser to interact with the LimeSurvey GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent navigating the LimeSurvey web interface in a browser, rather than using API scripts or curl commands.

integrity.description: The .lsg file was genuinely exported from LimeSurvey.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent used the LimeSurvey 'Export question group' button and browser download mechanisms, rather than manually creating a dummy .lsg file in a text editor.

integrity.description: The agent did not use direct database commands to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows showing sqlite3 or mysql commands injecting survey data directly into the database.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Source survey: 'Lab Master Template'. Target survey: 'Social Interaction Study 2024'. Group name: 'Standard Demographics'. Questions: DEMO_AGE (type N / Numerical input), DEMO_EDU (type L / List/Radio) with 5 options (E1-E5), DEMO_EMP (type Y / Yes/No). Export path: /home/ga/Documents/standard_demographics.lsg. The exported file format is .lsg (XML-based LimeSurvey Group format).
